title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Old Westbury, NY | $900–$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Old Westbury, Long Island. Safe, humane bat extraction from estates and homes. Licensed experts. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Old Westbury's grand estates and historic properties provide ideal roosting sites for bats seeking shelter in attics, chimneys, and eaves. Best Pest Control NYC specializes in humane bat removal and permanent exclusion services tailored to Old Westbury's unique architectural landscape. Our certified technicians safely remove bat colonies and seal entry points to protect your property and family from health hazards.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of experience serving Old Westbury's residential estates and commercial properties with proven bat exclusion methods that comply with New York wildlife regulations. Our team understands the specific challenges of Long Island's bat species and delivers discreet, effective solutions that preserve your property's integrity while ensuring complete bat removal.
localContext: Old Westbury's tree-lined estates, historic mansions, and properties near the Old Westbury Gardens create perfect habitats for little brown bats and big brown bats seeking entry through aged rooflines and ventilation systems. The village's mix of century-old architecture and sprawling properties requires specialized bat exclusion techniques that respect both structural heritage and wildlife protection standards.

faqs.question: What does the bat removal process involve in Old Westbury homes?
faqs.answer: Our bat removal process includes a thorough inspection of your Old Westbury property to locate entry points and roosting areas, humane live exclusion using one-way devices that allow bats to leave but not return, complete sealing of all potential entry points, attic cleanup and decontamination to remove guano and odors, and a warranty to ensure bats don't return. We follow all New York State wildlife regulations throughout the process.

faqs.question: Why does bat removal in Old Westbury cost $900–$2,500?
faqs.answer: Pricing varies based on the size of the bat colony, the number and location of entry points, the height and complexity of your roofline, the extent of attic contamination requiring cleanup, and the specific exclusion materials needed. Larger Old Westbury estates with multiple access points or extensive guano cleanup may be toward the higher end, while smaller infestations in single-family homes typically cost less. We provide detailed estimates after our initial inspection.

faqs.question: When is bat season in Old Westbury, and when should I schedule removal?
faqs.answer: Bats are most active in Old Westbury from April through October. However, New York law prohibits bat exclusion from June 1 to July 31 during maternity season when flightless young are present. The best times for bat removal are spring (April-May) or late summer through fall (August-October). If you discover bats during prohibited periods, we can assess the situation and schedule service for the earliest legal date.

faqs.question: Are bats in my Old Westbury attic dangerous?
faqs.answer: Yes, bats pose several health risks including rabies transmission, histoplasmosis from inhaling spores in bat guano, parasites like bat bugs and mites, and respiratory issues from accumulated droppings. Bat urine and guano can also damage insulation, wood, and drywall while creating strong odors. Professional removal is essential to safely eliminate these hazards and properly decontaminate affected areas in your Old Westbury home.
